flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at CUNY Hunter College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at CUNY Hunter College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (30.7% → 37.9%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at CUNY Hunter College fell 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.5k → $11.0k).
